step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the prior conclusion. An additional reason is that NO exerts its physiological actions predominantly via cGMP, whereas cAMP involves different downstream effector mechanisms, such as activation of protein kinase A. This further confirms that NO does not act via cAMP.
raw_response:
I agree with the prior conclusion. An additional reason is that NO exerts its physiological actions predominantly via cGMP, whereas cAMP involves different downstream effector mechanisms, such as activation of protein kinase A. This further confirms that NO does not act via cAMP.
